title: Learning how to set my AI Learning Blog
body: Setting up my AI Learning Blog to help record my chaotic journey with becoming an AI Master.  The idea was to use this blog as a journal to writing thoughts ideas and notes from what I learning from different sources.  I plan to use this as a knowledge collector to be converted later into more a joint AI knowledge builder where a personal AI Agent will help and assist me in my chaotic thinking to better organize and track my thoughts to reach my personal and professional goals.  Like in my first blog this will be a building process where the blogs will hopefully get better over time.
